ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the session occurred */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location of the user during the session */,
  "day_in_year" INTEGER /* Day of the year when the session occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used during the session */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used during the session */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "colour" INTEGER /* Colour of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_photography" (
  "photography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photography option */,
  "photography_name" TEXT /* Name of the photography option */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the product thumbnail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session when the order was placed */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "page" INTEGER /* Page where the order was placed */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session when the user accessed the website */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
